---
title: "Philips ISPM Data Dictionary"
---

The following Philips IntelliSpace Precision Medicine (ISPM) genomics tables are available:

| Category | Table Name |
|:---------|:-----------|
| Genomics | [aberrations](aberrations.qmd), [pat_diag_orders](pat_diag_orders.qmd), [specimen_data](specimen_data.qmd) |
